headline: HP (HPQ) at Morgan Stanley Conference, Responding to Challenges
summary: HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) is one of the 11 Best Tech Stocks Under $50 to Buy Now. On March 2, HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) took part in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference 2026, where CFO Karen Parkhill discussed the company’s strategy and how it is dealing with current challenges. headline: Lululemon just added Chip Bergh, a former Levi's CEO and Swiffer mop creator, to its board
summary: Chip Bergh's 12-year tenure as Levi's CEO is widely regarded as one of the most successful corporate turnarounds in modern retail. He's arguably parachuting into rockier waters at Lululemon than when he joined Levi's.

headline: Micron rides memory price spike into earnings with stock up 62%, drubbing its tech peers
summary: As generative AI models get more sophisticated, companies need more memory and faster memory, Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra said in January.
